name: Beef Stroganoff III
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Beef tenderloin or sirloin, cut into 2-by-1-inch strips
1/4 cup Sour cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. SPREAD BEEF STRIPS on a baking sheet and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Top with onion slices and let stand at room temperature for 2 hours.
2. MELT 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet over medium heat. ADD FLUOR AND STIR UNTIL IT FORMS A SLOW COOKER, THEN MIX IN STOCK AND HEAT UNTIL THICKENED.
3. BLEND IN MUSTARD AND REMOVE FROM HEAT. ADD THE REMAINING BATTER TO ANOTHER SKILLET OVER MEDIUM HEAT AND SAUTÉ UNTIL BROWNED.
4. ADD THE BEEF (BUT NOT THE ONION) TO THE SUGAR AND SIMMER FOR 15 MINUTES.
5. REMOVE FROM HEAT AND STIR IN SOUR CREAM. SERVE WITH ONIONS SEPARATELY OR RESERVE FOR ANOTHER USE.
